context_summary.description: Complete the migration configuration schema enhancements for IMP-CORE-040, 041, and 043. Add semantic parameter mapping with type converters and validation constraints, structured breaking changes tracking with impact levels, and middleware conversion mappings between frameworks.
context_summary.goal: Enable comprehensive API migration configuration with semantic parameter mapping, breaking change tracking, and middleware conversion support
key_requirements: Update migration-mapper.ts to support new schema sections
Add tests for new schema sections and mapping logic

success_criteria.schema_validation: All new sections validate correctly against JSON schema
success_criteria.test_coverage: Unit tests cover all new mapping types
success_criteria.documentation: Migration guide documents all new configuration options
success_criteria.integration: MigrationRouteAnalyzer can read and process all new sections

handoff_protocol.status_update_format: Phase X complete - Y tasks done, Z tests passing
